headline: Should Franklin’s (BEN) Push Into Digital Assets and Private Markets Reframe Its Core Investment Narrative?
summary: Franklin Resources, Inc. recently declared a quarterly dividend of US$0.33 per share payable on July 10, 2026, and announced new collaborations spanning onchain products with Payward and a customized equity SMA strategy with Ritholtz Wealth Management. These moves, alongside the appointment of a new head of private markets for Asia-Pacific wealth, suggest Franklin Resources is leaning further into private markets growth, digital asset infrastructure, and tailored wealth solutions. We'll now...
